page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Polishing genome assemblies with short reads.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Polypolish is a tool for polishing genome assemblies with short reads. Unlike other tools in this category, Polypolish uses SAM files where each read has been aligned to all possible locations (not just a single best location). This allows it to repair errors in repeat regions that other alignment-based polishers cannot fix.
